inputs.label: Base
inputs.businessContext: The base number to be raised to a power.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base number to be raised to a power.

inputs.label: Exponent
inputs.businessContext: The power to which the base is raised.

businessContext_i18n.en: The power to which the base is raised.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Exponent, mit dem die Basis potenziert wird.

inputs.label: Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiply the power result by this factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply the power result by this factor.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multipliziert das Potenzergebnis mit diesem Faktor.

inputs.label: Constant Addition
inputs.businessContext: Add a constant to the result after multiplication.

businessContext_i18n.en: Add a constant to the result after multiplication.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma işleminden sonra sonuca bir sabit ekleyin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Addiert eine Konstante zum Ergebnis nach der Multiplikation.

inputs.label: Modulus
inputs.businessContext: If greater than 0, the result is taken modulo this value.

businessContext_i18n.en: If greater than 0, the result is taken modulo this value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0'dan büyükse, sonuç bu değere göre mod alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn größer als 0, wird das Ergebnis modulo diesem Wert genommen.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for final rounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for final rounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son yuvarlama için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die finale Rundung.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
